moves.description: For 2 cycles, increases the User's outgoing damage by 1.1x.

moves.description: Marks the Target for 3 cycles. Whenever it attacks an Ally, the User counters with a 20 power typeless Special attack.

moves.description: Lowers the Target's Agility by 1.

moves.description: Lowers the Target's Defence and Sp. Defence by 1.

moves.description: Heals one Ally by 25% of the User's Max HP.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: Raises the User's Defence by 2.

moves.effects: Deals 35 power NONE special damage to one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Damage increases each time this move is used.
moves.description: Before damage, adds +0.1 StackMultiplier per User's previous Nonsense uses.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: restores 50% of the target's Max HP immediately, then 15% of the target's Max HP per turn cycle for 3 cycles.
moves.description: Heals one Ally for 50% of its Max HP immediately, then 15% per cycle for 3 cycles.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all battlers. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Affects all battlers; converts 2 weaknesses into resistances and also deals damage. Includes recoil/self-hit damage.
moves.description: Converts 2 of the User's Type weaknesses into resistances.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Heal: restores HP to the user equal to 15% of the user's Max HP when this end-of-turn effect resolves.

Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Heal: restores HP to the user equal to 30% of the user's Max HP when this end-of-turn effect resolves.

Status move affecting the user and adjacent allies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Heal: restores HP to each target equal to 40% of the user's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: Heals the User and adjacent Allies by 40% of the User's Max HP.

moves.description: Applies x1.25 incoming damage to Target for 3 cycles. This hit is not boosted.

Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 3 cycles.
moves.description: For 3 cycles, Agility changes are ignored.

moves.description: Raises the User's Agility and Crit Power by 1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 3 cycles.

moves.effects: Deals 55 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Damage increases on repeated use via its stacking effect.
moves.description: After the User's hit, each living ally queues a follow-up attack, with each follow-up attack striking with half the BP of the previous (55/27/13/6).

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies Overclock to self. Starts at 1 stack and temperature 50. Non-HP battle stats use multiplier max(0.67, (1 + 0.1 x stacks) x max(0.01, 2 - ((temperature + 273.15) / 363.15))); initial multiplier is about x1.22. Fire/Ice/Water hits adjust temperature using base +50/-40/-20 scaled by 0.3 per stack.
moves.description: Applies Overclock to User, granting a x1.22 all-stat buff. Fire/Ice/Water hits change this boost by -0.05/+0.04/+0.02.

moves.description: Lowers Target Agility by 1.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power ELECTRIC special damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Targets the selected enemy plus adjacent enemies and causes recoil to the user.
moves.description: Recoil: User loses 18% of final damage dealt, capped at 50% of User max HP.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Heal: restores 50% of the target's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: Heals one Ally by 50% of the Target's Max HP.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: For 4 cycles, damages enemies that hit the user.
moves.description: For 4 cycles, contact attackers take 10 flat HP electric counter-damage.

moves.effects: Deals 30 power ELECTRIC physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: Lowers the Target's SP by 1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: Raises the User's Attack by 2.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: Raises the User's Agility by 2.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: Damage scales from the user punch/charge state, then applies its listed HP-change effect.
moves.description: Power is 0. OHKOs if the User previously used both Press Up and Sit Up.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally other than the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: Adds the User's power (defenses + level / some other shit) to the Target Ally's next attack.

moves.effects: Deals 65 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Deals 50 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. Contact move. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: If the Target has Updraft, this move's BP is set to 160 instead of 50.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power CHAKRA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one chosen battler. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Removes active information/effects from the target.
moves.description: Removes active effects and all stat changes from the Target.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power DATA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Heal: if the hit removes the target's Shield effect, the user restores HP equal to the removed shield's stored value.
moves.description: Breaks/removes the Target's Shield before striking and heals the User by the Shield's remaining HP.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a heavy DATA shield to the user; allied skills cost +1 SP while active.
moves.description: Gives the User a shield equal to 80% of the User's Max HP with 90% mitigation. While active, same-side allied Moves cost +1 SP.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user side. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a protective/reflective effect. Effect duration: 2 cycles.
moves.description: Creates a 2-cycle User-Type barrier with no shield HP pool. Matching-type attacks have their damage set to 0, and the duration decreases by 1 each time it blocks.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: Raises the User's Agility by 1, or by 2 if the turn gap since the previous Defragmentation is greater than 3.

moves.effects: Deals 30 power DATA special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Deals damage and strongly lowers target Agility.
moves.description: Lowers Target Agility by 2.

moves.effects: Deals 120 power DATA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Heal: restores 100% of the target's Max HP, then applies normal heal modifiers and clamping.
moves.description: Fully heals one Ally, restoring 100% of the Target's Max HP.

moves.effects: Deals 71 power DATA special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power DEMON physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Contact move. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: Critical chance multiplier x5.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: Lowers Attack by 1 for all enemies.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: Corrupts the Target so it attacks its Allies.

moves.effects: Deals 100 power DEMON physical damage to one enemy. 90% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Deals 90 power DEMON special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 5 SP. Special: Applies recurring damage to the target for the rest of battle.
moves.description: Curses the Target for the rest of battle, dealing 15% of Max HP as damage each turn cycle.

moves.effects: Deals 140 power ANCIENT physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Contact move.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Deals 140 power ANCIENT special damage to the target and adjacent enemies. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: If the user is in trouble, applies a self stat increase.
moves.description: If the User is below 30% Max HP, raises all stats by 4.

moves.effects: Deals 80 power ANCIENT special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Deals damage and raises the user Agility.
moves.description: Raises User Agility by 1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies Director to the user for 3 cycles.
moves.description: Gives the User +1 SP for each of the next 3 turn cycles.

moves.effects: Deals 85 power NONE special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP.
moves.description: No extra effect.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 25% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Attempts to roll/apply one of several random outcomes.
moves.description: 25% accuracy. If it hits, raises all stats by 1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Damage-over-time flag is TRUE. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Deals 20 power NONE status damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column. Effect duration: 1 cycle.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting one ally. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies a protective/reflective effect.
moves.description: Gives one Ally a shield equal to 50% of the Target's Max HP with 100% mitigation. Breaks when the shield HP is depleted.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: Removes active field effects from the battlefield.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: For 1 cycle, redirects the target next attack.
moves.description: For 1 cycle, redirects the Target's next attack to the User.

moves.effects: Deals 60 power WATER physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Contact move. Special: Deals damage and raises the user Agility.
moves.description: Raises the User's Agility by 1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a field/domain-style effect for the user side.
moves.description: Creates a field for the User's side where Anomalous Moves deal 1.25x damage and Chakra Moves deal 0.8x damage.

moves.effects: Deals 30 power FIRE special damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: Extra effect makes it hit all valid foes.

moves.effects: Deals 75 power CHAKRA physical damage to one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: Bypasses accuracy checks. Breaks/removes the Target's Shield before striking and adds 10% of that Shield's HP as additional damage.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 2 SP. Special: Applies an Anivis field effect and its listed secondary effect.
moves.description: Gives the User a shield equal to 50% of the User's Max HP with 50% mitigation, and raises Defense by 1.

moves.effects: Deals 40 power ELECTRIC physical damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat or resource reduction described in the text.
moves.description: Before damage, each positive User Agility Stage gives x1.25 damage and x0.85 accuracy. If the first target is hit, raises Agility by 1. Otherwise, lowers Agility by -1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: applies an additional effect listed in the Effects column.
moves.description: Removes all stat changes from all enemies.

moves.effects: Deals 70 power DATA special damage to all enemies on the target side. 100% accuracy; costs 4 SP. Special: Hits the target side and raises the user Defence.
moves.description: Raises User Def and SpDef by 1.

moves.effects: Status move affecting the user. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: For 4 cycles, creates an electric field that damages battlers present or entering battle and boosts Electric moves.
moves.description: Creates a static field that deals 5 flat HP damage to Animon that enter and makes Electric Moves deal 1.3x damage for 4 cycles.

moves.effects: Status move affecting one enemy. 100% accuracy; costs 3 SP. Special: Applies a stat, damage, or resource increase described in the text.
moves.description: On the User's next attack, each positive Agility stage gives +25% damage and -15% accuracy. If the attack hits, raises the User's Agility by 1. If the attack misses, lowers the User's Agility by 1.

moves.effects: Deals 140 power FIRE status damage to all battlers. 100% accuracy; costs 1 SP. End-of-turn flag is TRUE. Special: Hits all battlers with 140 power and includes a self-hit/recoil component.

quirks.description: The Animon acts later in the turn cycle, but has 1 more SP.
quirks.effectDetails: Adds +1 SP while causing the Animon to act later.

quirks.description: Boosts the Animon's stats if an Animon with Cathode is also in battle.
quirks.effectDetails: With a Cathode ally in battle: Attack, Defence, Sp. Attack, Sp. Defence, and Agility x1.2 (+20%).
Adds +1 team SP. Agility scales with active debuffs: x1.1 with 1, x1.3 with 2, x1.7 with 3, and x2.0 with 4+ debuffs. Also increases affected skill cost by +1 SP.

quirks.description: The Animon can only be hit by direct attacks, but cannot be healed.
quirks.effectDetails: Only direct attacks can hit this Animon; healing received is blocked (healing x0).

quirks.description: The Animon is not damaged by recoil.
quirks.effectDetails: Recoil damage is reduced to 0.

quirks.description: Boosts the Animon's stats if an Animon with Anode is also in battle.
quirks.effectDetails: With an Anode ally in battle: Attack, Defence, Sp. Attack, Sp. Defence, and Agility x1.2 (+20%).

quirks.description: Increases the damage inflicted by the Animon, but it is damaged slightly each time.
quirks.effectDetails: User attacks deal x1.2 damage (+20%); the user takes 4 recoil damage after attacking.

quirks.description: When the Animon attacks, there is a chance for all negative effects to be removed.
quirks.effectDetails: 15% chance after attacking to remove all negative effects from the user.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Virus-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains a Virus weakness.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Demon-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains a Demon weakness.

quirks.description: When Knequital is in trouble, it draws swords and grows stronger.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, switches to its sword form.

quirks.description: Increases the Animon's Accuracy during battle.
quirks.effectDetails: User move accuracy x1.2 (+20%).

quirks.description: The Animon's attacks always hit, but attacks against it never miss.
quirks.effectDetails: This Animon attacks with guaranteed accuracy, and attacks against this Animon also have guaranteed accuracy.

quirks.description: Protects the Animon from additional skill effects.
quirks.effectDetails: Blocks additional skill effects from applying to this Animon.

quirks.description: The Animon's attacks inflict less damage, but echo off opponents.
quirks.effectDetails: User attacks deal x0.7 damage (-30%); the attack echoes up to 3 additional times.

quirks.description: When Dualine is in trouble, it uses its tail to change into it's most powerful form.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, changes into its strongest form.

quirks.description: Reduces the cost of low-power skills by 1 SP, to a minimum of 1 SP.
quirks.effectDetails: Skills with Power <= 70 cost 1 less SP, with a minimum cost of 1 SP.

quirks.description: The Animon can always escape.
quirks.effectDetails: Escape/run-away attempts are forced to succeed.

quirks.description: When the Animon's stats are modified, the damage of its next attack is increased.
quirks.effectDetails: After the user stats are modified, the next attack deals x1.3 damage (+30%).

quirks.description: Increases the damage of the Animon's next skill when hit by a Fire attack.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit by a Fire attack, the next skill deals x1.3 damage (+30%).

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Geo-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains a Geo weakness.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Aura-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains an Aura weakness.

quirks.description: The Animon's SP decrease by 1 in battle, but its entire team's damage increases.
quirks.effectDetails: Team damage dealt x1.15 (+15%); team SP is reduced by 1.

quirks.description: The Animon is immune to critical hits.
quirks.effectDetails: Critical hits against this Animon are blocked.

quirks.description: Increases the damage of the next attack based on healing provided to allies.
quirks.effectDetails: When this Animon heals an ally, stores the actual HP healed up to its cap; the next attack adds stored healing / 3.5 as damage, then clears the stored value.

quirks.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.
quirks.effectDetails: Critical-hit damage x1.5 (+50%).

quirks.description: The Animon can steal the opponent's held item during battle.
quirks.effectDetails: Can steal the target held item during battle.

quirks.description: Increases the damage inflicted by the Animon, but decreases the Accuracy of attacks.
quirks.effectDetails: User attacks deal x1.5 damage (+50%) and have x0.75 accuracy (-25%).

quirks.description: When Patround hits an enemy, it enters Pursuit mode until it is defeated.
quirks.effectDetails: After hitting an enemy, enters Pursuit mode until defeated.

quirks.description: Doubles Attack and Special Attack in battle.
quirks.effectDetails: Attack and Sp. Attack x2.0 (+100%).

quirks.description: All skills lose their type, but are considerably boosted.
quirks.effectDetails: User skills become typeless and deal x1.7 damage (+70%).

quirks.description: Attacks the Animon with the lowest HP at the end of its turn.
quirks.effectDetails: At end of turn, attacks the lowest-HP enemy for a 10% HP damage effect.

quirks.description: Prevents the Animon from being defeated by a single blow.
quirks.effectDetails: A would-be one-hit KO leaves the Animon at 1 HP instead.

quirks.description: The damage inflicted by Primalong increases after every attack.
quirks.effectDetails: Damage increases by +8% per attack target, up to +200%.

quirks.description: The Animon has a snow sculpture that boosts its capabilities, but melts when exposed to Fire.
quirks.effectDetails: Snow sculpture state changes stats: intact state applies Attack and Defence x1.2 (+20%); melted/exposed state applies Attack and Defence x0.7 (-30%) plus Agility x1.15 (+15%). Fire attacks trigger the melted state.

quirks.description: Increases the chance of landing critical hits and activating secondary effects.
quirks.effectDetails: Critical-hit chance and secondary-effect activation chance x1.3 (+30%).

quirks.description: During the battle, Morsiver accumulates energy until it ignites and grows stronger.
quirks.effectDetails: Becomes Ignited after landing 3 hits. Ignited form attacks deal x1.35 damage (+35%).

quirks.description: Increases the damage of Chakra-type skills, and skills without a type.
quirks.effectDetails: Chakra or typeless attacks deal x1.5 damage (+50%).

quirks.description: Muribang inflates, then explodes as soon as it is hit by a contact skill.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit by a contact attack, triggers an explosion effect (Fire, 140 BP, hits all Animon, scales with Special Attack, user faints after).

quirks.description: The Animon cures itself and its allies when it leaves the battlefield.
quirks.effectDetails: When leaving battle, heals itself and allies for 20% of each target's Max HP, scaling with normal heal modifiers and clamping.

quirks.description: Prevents the Animon's Attack and Special Attack from being reduced.
quirks.effectDetails: Prevents Attack and Sp. Attack stat reductions.

quirks.description: When Blumester is in trouble, it changes direction and grows stronger.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, changes form and increases Attack and Special Attack by 2 and Agility by 1.

quirks.description: Reduces damage received and improves healing for the whole team.
quirks.effectDetails: Team incoming damage x0.9 (-10%), team healing received x1.1 (+10%).

quirks.description: When the Animon is hit by an Electric attack, its Attack and Defence are increased.
quirks.effectDetails: When hit by an Electric attack, raises Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.

quirks.description: Maximises the Animon's Attack when it takes a critical hit, but severely reduces defences.
quirks.effectDetails: After receiving a critical hit, Attack becomes +6 while Defence and Special Defence get -2.

quirks.description: The first target hit by the Animon is inflicted with a weakness to Electric-type skills.
quirks.effectDetails: The first target hit gains an Electric weakness.

quirks.description: When the Animon is hit, the attacking Animon's Agility is reduced.
quirks.effectDetails: When hit, lowers the attacker Agility by 1 stage.

quirks.description: When Blumester is in trouble, it reveals itself, reducing the opponent's Agility.
quirks.effectDetails: When HP falls below 50%, changes form and lowers enemy Agility by 2.

quirks.description: Increases the Animon's SP in battle by 1.
quirks.effectDetails: Adds +1 SP.

quirks.description: When the Animon is hit, the cost of the opponent's next action increases by 1 SP.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit, the opponent next action costs +1 SP.

quirks.description: Stacks with ally Veveso in battle, increasing its combative power
quirks.effectDetails: With 2, 3, or 4 allied Totem users: all battle stat multipliers x1.2 (+20%), x1.4 (+40%), or x1.6 (+60%).

quirks.description: Nuclheart fills any empty places in battle with puppets of toxic waste.
quirks.effectDetails: Empty ally slots are filled with Nuclheart puppets. Dog -> Bird -> Taurus.

quirks.description: Increases the damage of skills of the same type as the Animon.
quirks.effectDetails: Moves matching the User's main or hidden type deal x1.5 damage (+50%).

quirks.description: When the Animon is in trouble or suffering from negative effects, its Attack increases.
quirks.effectDetails: If HP is below 50% or the user has any active debuff: Attack and Sp. Attack x1.5 (+50%).

quirks.description: When Kentaress is hit by a super effective attack, it reacts and improves by changing its weaknesses.
quirks.effectDetails: After being hit super effectively, changes weakness profile. Agility also scales with active debuffs: x1.1 with 1, x1.3 with 2, x1.7 with 3, and x2.0 with 4+ debuffs.

quirks.description: When the Animon is suffering from a negative effect, the Animon's Agility increases.
quirks.effectDetails: Agility scales with active debuffs: x1.1 with 1, x1.3 with 2, x1.7 with 3, and x2.0 with 4+ debuffs.

heldItems.description: Increases an Animon’s stats in battle if it can evolve.
heldItems.actualEffect: If the holder's current form has at least one evolution, Attack, Defence, Special Attack, Special Defence, and Agility are multiplied by 1.2, increasing them by 20%. HP is not boosted.

heldItems.description: A special band that doubles the holder’s stat changes.
heldItems.actualEffect: Doubles the attempted stat-stage change amount affecting the holder.

heldItems.description: A magical-looking hourglass. When the Animon attacks, there’s a chance the action cost is reset to zero.
heldItems.actualEffect: When the holder pays action/SP cost, has a 15% chance to set the final cost multiplier to 0, making that cost 0.

heldItems.description: An item that increases the holder's Special Attack, but prevents the Animon from leaving the field after entering the battle.
heldItems.actualEffect: Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5, increasing it by 50%. The holder cannot switch out while the item effect is active.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Fire-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Fire-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Electric-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Electric-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: Item that enhances the effect of the holder's attribute trait.
heldItems.actualEffect: When the holder uses its attribute trait, adds to EmoTypeFlatBuff: SEREUM +16.66667, FELICIS +0.15, FUROR +0.15, HORRENS +0.08, MESTUS +0.05.

heldItems.description: Item that replenishes the holder’s HP after every action.
heldItems.actualEffect: After each holder action, heals the holder for 8 HP.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Ice-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Ice-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: Durable jacket that reduces damage received.
heldItems.actualEffect: Incoming damage to the holder is multiplied by 0.7, reducing it by 30%. The holder's move cost is increased by 1.

heldItems.description: A very high-tech device that can generate electromagnetic fields. Creates a protective shield as soon as the holder enters the field.
heldItems.actualEffect: When the holder enters the field, applies a ShieldEffect to the holder if one from this item is not already present. ShieldStrength is 30 and Mitigation is 100, so it blocks up to 30 damage at full mitigation before being depleted.

heldItems.description: Mystical card that increases the damage of Anomalous-type attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: Anomalous-type move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.15, increasing it by 15%.

heldItems.description: A very heavy lead glove that enhances an Animon’s attacking abilities.
heldItems.actualEffect: Outgoing damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.35, increasing it by 35%. The holder's move cost is increased by 1.

heldItems.description: An item that increases the holder's Attack, but prevents the Animon from leaving the field after entering the battle.
heldItems.actualEffect: Attack is multiplied by 1.5, increasing it by 50%. The holder cannot switch out while the item effect is active.

heldItems.description: A special chain that inspires the holder to turn single-target attacks into a chain of attacks on adjacent targets, at the expense of any effects.
heldItems.actualEffect: For damaging moves with power greater than 0, changes the move to AOEType 3 so it chains to adjacent targets, and removes all additional move effects.

heldItems.description: A special bandage that enhances the holder's ability to heal other Animon.
heldItems.actualEffect: Healing caused by the holder is multiplied by 1.25, increasing healing by 25%.

heldItems.description: A generic manual explaining how to best use certain skills. Increases the power of typeless skills.
heldItems.actualEffect: Typeless/NONE move damage from the holder is multiplied by 1.25, increasing it by 25%.

heldItems.description: Can lower the Defence and Special Defence by one level when the holder attacks.
heldItems.actualEffect: On the holder's attack against another battler, has a 10% chance to lower the target's Defence by 1 stage and Special Defence by 1 stage.
